Response returns Saga onsen ryokan list with 4 results. 和多屋別荘 (Wataya Besso, lat 33.098, lng 129.989) is in Ureshino area — this is the most famous Ureshino ryokan, a genuine result. However 伊万里温泉 is in Imari (different location), 佐賀大和温泉 is near Saga city (different area), 武雄温泉ユースホステル is in Takeo (different onsen area). Only 1 of 4 results is actually in 嬉野温泉. Very sparse Ureshino coverage.
